title: Shipments, parcels, internal carrier sync, after-sales ticketing, evidence upload, compensation engine
key_decisions: simulateCarrierResponse is a pure function — age buckets: pending <1h, in_transit >=1h, out_for_delivery >=6h, delivered >=24h; no network calls
Evidence upload pipeline: magic-byte validation -> 10MB check -> sharp compress (max 1920px, quality 80) -> aHash -> Hamming <=5 dedup check -> write to /data/storage
Compensation rule engine: DB-driven CompensationRule rows + hard-coded default ($10 credit for >=48h delay, $50 global cap); approval tiers: limited=$25, full=$50, override=infinity
Credit compensation auto-topups student stored value via storedValueService.topUp() within same approval flow
SLA map: delay=72h, dispute=48h, lost_item=96h; at_risk threshold = 4h remaining
Auto-suggest compensation triggered for delay tickets on creation
Carrier sync: CarrierConnector.syncParcels iterates active parcels, applies simulateCarrierResponse, calls updateParcelStatus, appends timeline to open after-sales tickets
shipmentSyncQueue registered in jobs/index.ts; campusops:shipment-sync runs every 5 minutes
